privacy: Artwork, projects and preferences stay on the device unless the person using AIR-DROW explicitly exports, shares or starts an optional AI creation.
releaseGate: npm run vercel:build validates bilingual markup and runtime coverage, dynamic language re-rendering, six paired theme palettes, icon contrast, selection guard, local hand model and generated production assets.
support: Use Settings > About App to review app readiness, hand drawing readiness, language, and release information.
name: AIR-DROW Input, Language & Hand Startup Edition
